rationale: Remove deprecated Java 9 methods; internal refactor with no spec-defined behavior.
Java 9 covariant ByteBuffer return types; language compatibility fix, no spec involvement.
Upgrade Groovy and Spock testing framework versions; build dependency, no spec behavior.
IPv6 address parsing bug in ServerAddress#sameHost; implementation flaw, no specific SDAM rule contradicted.
POJO codec drops null fields causing deserialization failure; Java-specific codec behavior, not BSON spec.
POJO codec uses exact types instead of assignable; internal codec improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
Reduce Evergreen CI test matrix combinations; CI configuration, no spec behavior.
Resume token must be BSON type 4 UUID per server requirement; driver encodes as type 3 by default.
Skip tests relying on configureFailPoint when unavailable; CI/test infrastructure improvement.
Test helper should wait for a known server version before proceeding; internal test infrastructure fix.
IllegalAccessError in async driver on classloader redeployment; JVM classloading issue, no spec rule.
SSL certificate failure with old JDK; JDK compatibility documentation issue, no spec violation.
Bulk unacknowledged inserts sent individually; performance complaint; no specific spec rule mandates batch wire encoding.
Remove dead batch-splitting code after dropping 2.4 support; internal refactor, no behavior change.
Test matcher bug: Groovy += returns new list; test code defect, no driver spec behavior.
Add more host types to Evergreen CI matrix; CI infrastructure, no spec behavior.
Removes initialClusterTime and initialOperationTime from ClientSessionOptions because spec no longer has these options.
Change stream spec requires documentKey field in ChangeStreamDocument; Java driver class missing that property.
ServerDescriptionTest uses hardcoded '.' decimal separator; locale-specific test bug, no spec behavior.
toString() in FacetStage prints '$fact' instead of '$facet'; trivial code typo, no spec impact.
Tailable cursor hasNext() blocks after close from another thread; threading bug, no spec rule on cross-thread cursor close.
Driver rejects 2dsphere index version 3; driver-imposed limit not spec-defined; no index spec rule contradicted.
Enable change stream integration tests against sharded cluster; test coverage expansion, not a driver bug.
Documentation links missing '/' in URL; doc publishing bug, no spec behavior.
Improve performance of ByteBufPayloadBsonDocument; performance optimization, no spec rule involved.
Improve wire version compatibility error messages; UX improvement; DRIVERS-422 dependency but no spec nonconformance.
Sessions spec requires single authenticated user; multiple-credential constructors violate that; deprecating per DRIVERS-419.
Spec requires excluding non-data-bearing servers when checking session support; driver did not implement this correctly.
Upgrade FindBugs for Java 9 compatibility; build tooling, no spec behavior.
Upgrade Netty to fix flaky SSL GridFS test; dependency bump, no spec behavior change.
Update documentation links to MongoDB 3.6 features; doc maintenance, no spec behavior.
Upgrade CodeNarc static analysis tool; build tooling, no spec behavior.
Spec (SPEC-999) prohibits session identifier on unacknowledged writes; driver must omit it.
Multi=true writes incorrectly marked retryable due to tracking only last request; violates retryable writes spec.
Race condition in ChangeStream test cleanup due to async cursor close; test infrastructure bug.
@BsonIgnore doesn't prevent TypeData processing of ignored fields; Java POJO codec bug, not a BSON spec rule.
Support sub-class POJO deserialization with @BsonCreator; Java POJO codec feature, no spec rule.
Improve @BsonCreator property name lookup in ConventionAnnotationImpl; Java POJO codec internal improvement.
POJO with generic interface fails serialization due to duplicate method signatures; Java codec limitation, no spec rule.
Allow discriminators in collections by encoding actual class type; Java POJO codec feature, no spec rule.
Investigate Optional<T> support in PojoCodec; Java-specific codec investigation, no spec behavior.
Unresolved '%s' placeholder in POJO error message; trivial string formatting bug, no spec behavior.
@BsonCreator annotation processing depends on reflection ordering; Java POJO codec bug, no spec rule.
Custom Map/collection implementations fail TypeData validation in PojoCodec; Java codec feature, no spec rule.
Enhance driver-core integration tests to use implicit sessions on 3.6+; test coverage improvement, not a driver bug.
Improve MongoDB error code documentation; doc improvement, no spec behavior.
NPE in ProtocolHelper.sendCommandStartedEvent when compression enabled; implementation bug, no specific spec rule.
DBEncoderAdapter bypasses ElementExtendingBsonWriter so $db field missing in OP_MSG; wire protocol violation.
NPE in ClientMetadataHelper.getDriverVersion when manifest is absent in shaded jar; packaging/classloading bug.
Race in async cursor close causes pool check failure in test cleanup; test infrastructure timing bug.
